details: Quote was found in article_text.txt after whitespace/dash normalization; DOI, compound 6c binding, 138-139 deg C melting point, measured data type, and midpoint are supported.
Raw HTML quote was present in the cited HTML file and contains compound 3b with Mp 207-210 deg C; DOI and measured characterization context are supported.
Quote was found in article_text.txt after normalization and supports compound 2a with mp 91-93 deg C; DOI, measured data type, and midpoint are supported.

The value and compound are present in the HTML source, but the CSV evidence_quote is rendered text that omits intervening raw HTML tags such as <b>, <span>, <sup>, and <sub>, so it is not a contiguous source substring under the allowed normalizations.
